item.title:
BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 23min Two things true scenario:
Isn’t about the licence fee.
This should be (miles and mil
item.description:
Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 23min Two things true scenario:
Isn’t about the licence fee.
This should be (miles and miles) beneath the BBC.
Nobody needs to know what some moderately famous Arsenal fan has to say about Liverpool, either. And if they do want to the BBC shouldn’t be where they go to find out. Cita BBC Sport @BBCSport · 2h "Arsenal fans are the worst fanbase in the world."
It's fair to say Paddy Pimblett does not want Arsenal to win the league. 2 7 1 mil

item.title:
Coral: Bruce Millington reposteó Coral @Coral · 21h 𝐆𝐞𝐭 𝐌𝐨𝐫𝐞 𝐒𝐜𝐨𝐭𝐭𝐢𝐬𝐡!
We invited Sean Bowen & Brendan Powell to a photoshoot
Betgolfworld: Niall Lyons @Betgolfworld · 2h Schauffele was going great until the final few holes. Disappointing finish 1 670
item.description: Niall Lyons @Betgolfworld · 2h Schauffele was going great until the final few holes. Disappointing finish 1 670

item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 3h O’Neil interview with employee as you’d expect: evasive, defensive, loaded with nonsense. T
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 3h O’Neil interview with employee as you’d expect: evasive, defensive, loaded with nonsense. The interesting line was plan to ‘blend a version of LIV and the national opens’. Note DPWT has Irish, Scottish, French, Dutch, Italy, Spanish, Australia, South Africa, China, India, Kenya. 8 29 6 mil

item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 3h En respuesta a @BenColeyGolf So it’s either try to take over some of these events or try t
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 3h En respuesta a @BenColeyGolf So it’s either try to take over some of these events or try to deal with DPWT. This ‘plan’ is likely very new: they were not planning for PIF funding to be taken away. He was not asked who is going to pay to renew Bryson’s contract, and how prize money might be affected. 2 8 2 mil

item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 3h En respuesta a @BenColeyGolf As for ‘anonymous sources’ complaint, pure gaslighting. If yo
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 3h En respuesta a @BenColeyGolf As for ‘anonymous sources’ complaint, pure gaslighting. If you want to complain about anonymous sources (which have brought down governments btw), you first have to discredit the story. Not once has he done that. All in all a pretty pathetic, state-sponsored (for now) spectacle. 2 2 17 2 mil
